'''''Challenge'' 38''' was a roleplaying magazine from June/July of [[1989]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called ''[[Starfighters Down]]'' and was written by [[William W. Connors]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
